issue.tagline: 追随建造者，而非追随影响者

lead.title: Claude Code Artifacts 重磅上线，AI 编程进入「可视化协作」时代
paras: Anthropic 昨日正式推出 Claude Code Artifacts——一项革命性功能，让 AI 编程代理的工作成果从终端屏幕跃升为可交互、可分享的实时网页。PR 演练、系统架构图、调试时间线、发布清单……这些过去需要反复文字沟通才能同步的信息，现在由 Claude Code 自动生成并持续更新。该功能已在 Team 和 Enterprise 计划中开启 Beta 测试，发布推文获超 1.3 万点赞。
与此同时，围绕 AI 的监管博弈正在升级。Bernie Sanders 提出法案拟对收入超 2 亿美元的 AI 初创公司征收 50% 资产，YC CEO Garry Tan 愤怒回击称这是「对美国创业的宣战」。Box CEO Aaron Levie 则从 Fable 模型审查事件中嗅到了未来 AI 监管的信号：模型更新或将经历越来越漫长的审批流程，创新节奏面临结构性放缓的风险。

podcast.label: 本期播客
podcast.title: Neocloud 崛起：2026 AI 算力全景 | Stephen Balaban
podcast.meta: The MAD Podcast with Matt Turck · 6月18日
paras: Lambda 联合创始人兼 CTO Stephen Balaban 在访谈中抛出一个强硬判断：那些预测 GPU 会在五年内变成废铁的人「完全错了，而且一直都错」。他认为整个行业仍在「持续低估建设量」，对大语言模型的需求——从助手到代码生成——看不到尽头。
一个反直觉的发现是：2023 年购入的 H100 如今租赁价格反而更高。Balaban 揭示了背后逻辑——真正的护城河不在技术，而在融资结构：Off-take 协议、SPV 和信贷工具构成了一套复杂的资本机器，决定了谁能建造千兆瓦级 AI 工厂。
关于 AI 对软件开发的影响，Balaban 有一个犀利的论断：「AI 不会写软件——它会成为软件本身。」他区分了「Neural Software」和「Vibe Coding」，认为真正的变革不是让 AI 写代码，而是让 AI 成为运行时的一部分。

items.name: Thariq
items.text: Claude Code can now upload and edit HTML artifacts that you can share with your team or other Claudes! Starting with teams so you can share internally with your team, coming to Pro and MAX plans soon!

items.name: Boris Cherny
items.text: I've been using Artifacts in Claude Code for everything: visual explanations of tricky code, system diagrams, quick previews of a few animation options, data analyses and dashboards I share with the team. They are a game changer for how I work with Claude.

items.name: Aaron Levie
items.text: The fact that open weights models are being discussed credibly at this level of capability should be a huge update for many. The implications of open models getting to frontier performance ensures that you can always have sovereign AI, have the ability to post train for your specific workflows, cost optimize for various workloads, and actually afford to do much more with AI. Huge win for the applied AI layer.

items.name: Garry Tan
items.text: Bernie Sanders introduced a bill to seize 50% of any AI startup that crosses $200M in revenue. The same anti-prosperity bloc spent the year trying to ban startup acquisitions, blocking the only exit 85% of founders ever get. This is a war on building startups in America.

items.name: Nan Yu
items.text: It took us a lot of iterations to find the right pattern for this. Early on we were very naive and we thought that the agent could one shot project updates without much input from users. That approach ended up creating a bunch of slop, because users disengaged their brain from the process of writing an update. By switching to a multi turn interactive mode, the agent prompts you and asks you what to emphasize, what's most important, what context is missing, etc. A very good example of introducing friction for a net benefit.

items.name: Zara Zhang
items.text: Don't use AI for writing until you develop your own taste and voice. Using AI to write isn't inherently bad. The danger is using AI to write before you've developed your taste for what is good content. If the AI produces slop, you won't even recognize it as slop.

items.name: Nikunj Kothari
items.text: Launched a side project quietly a few weeks ago. Wanted to test how many impressions/clicks I could get by simply having Claude Code / Codex optimize the hell out of the website. Got it to about 16k impressions, and 94 clicks over the last 28 days. No backlinks, no mention of this website anywhere on my socials, no Reddit hacking - simply old school SEO/GEO optimization.

items.name: Peter Steinberger
items.text: Everything's either a fast or slow API now.

items.name: Claude Blog
items.title: Claude Code now supports artifacts
items.content: Claude Code Artifacts 将 AI 编程代理的工作转化为实时、可交互的可视化网页——包括 PR 演练、系统解释器、仪表盘和发布清单，随着会话推进自动更新。它利用会话的完整上下文（代码库、连接器、对话本身）构建页面，无需额外配置数据源。每次发布保留版本历史，支持一键恢复，团队成员打开同一链接即可看到最新内容。目前在 Team 和 Enterprise 计划中以 Beta 形式提供。

colophon.label: 关于
